channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1835] sanity-benchmark Oops when run with ofd + ldiskfs
item.description:
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-benchmark test dbench: dbench == 09:37:59 (1346863079)
BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at (null)
IP: [<(null)>] (null)
PGD 7032b067 PUD 7b4c0067 PMD 0
Oops: 0010 1 SMP
last sysfs file: /sys/devices/system/cpu/possible
CPU 0
Modules linked in: osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]

Pid: 21801, comm: ll_ost_io00_006 Not tainted 2.6.32-279.5.1.el6_lustre.g293c36b.x86_64 #1 Red Hat KVM
RIP: 0010:[<0000000000000000>] [<(null)>] (null)
RSP: 0018:ffff8800022031d8 EFLAGS: 00010002
RAX: ffff8800772ac880 RBX: ffff88005ec4d200 RCX: ffff880037c9e4b4
RDX: 0000000000000039 RSI: 0000000000000001 RDI: ffff8800772ac880
RBP: ffff8800022031f0 R08: 0000000000000000 R09: 0000000000000000
R10: 0000000000000000 R11: 0000000000000000 R12: ffff880037c9e400
R13: ffff88005ec4d200 R14: 0000000000000000 R15: ffff880037c9e400
FS: 00007fb797db3700(0000) GS:ffff880002200000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
CS: 0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 000000008005003b
CR2: 0000000000000000 CR3: 0000000070329000 CR4: 00000000000006f0
DR0: 0000000000000000 DR1: 0000000000000000 DR2: 0000000000000000
DR3: 0000000000000000 DR6: 00000000ffff0ff0 DR7: 0000000000000400
Process ll_ost_io00_006 (pid: 21801, threadinfo ffff88004f12e000, task ffff88004adb6ae0)
Stack:
ffffffff811acedf ffff880002203200 ffff880070742ea0 ffff880002203200
<d> ffffffff811b147d ffff880002203260 ffffffffa0001524 ffff88005ec4d2c0
<d> ffff880000000000 ffff880000000001 000000000000001c 0000000000000000
Call Trace:
<IRQ>
[<ffffffff811acedf>] ? end_bio_bh_io_sync+0x2f/0x60
[<ffffffff811b147d>] bio_endio+0x1d/0x40

[<ffffffff81254fcb>] req_bio_endio+0x9b/0xe0

[<ffffffff8100df09>] handle_irq+0x49/0xa0

[<ffffffffa0108e41>] ? cp_interrupt+0x71/0x510 [8139cp]
[<ffffffff810db930>] ? handle_IRQ_event+0x60/0x170
[<ffffffff8102e2a9>] ? ack_apic_level+0x79/0x1b0
[<ffffffff810de1e8>] ? handle_fasteoi_irq+0x88/0xf0

[<ffffffff8143f603>] ? net_rx_action+0x103/0x2f0

[<ffffffff8100ba53>] ? ret_from_intr+0x0/0x11
<EOI>
[<ffffffff8127e7f5>] ? memset+0x45/0xc0
[<ffffffffa0d8febe>] ? osd_write_prep+0x35e/0x420 [osd_ldiskfs]
[<ffffffffa0d8eb0e>] ? osd_bufs_get+0x1fe/0x390 [osd_ldiskfs]
[<ffffffffa0bc98d1>] ? ofd_preprw+0x7a1/0x1060 [ofd]
[<ffffffffa0b8f81c>] ? obd_preprw+0x12c/0x3d0 [ost]
[<ffffffffa0b9698a>] ? ost_brw_write+0x87a/0x1600 [ost]
[<ffffffff8127ce76>] ? vsnprintf+0x2b6/0x5f0
[<ffffffffa06e220c>] ? lustre_msg_get_version+0x8c/0x100 [ptlrpc]

Code: Bad RIP value.
RIP [<(null)>] (null)
RSP <ffff8800022031d8>
CR2: 0000000000000000
Initializing cgroup subsys cpuset

Maloo report will be available when complete
item.summary: sanity-benchmark Oops when run with ofd + ldiskfs

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This could be related to LU-1883.
